chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-239 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.574/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2026 Mr. Tahmasib Saeed, advocate for private respondents. = None present for the applicant. Learned counsel for private respondents states that revision application was filed against the Order dated 06.12.2023 passed on application under Order I Rule 10 CPC and application under Order VI Rule 17 CPC. He further submits that civil suit has been dismissed, therefore, revision application has become infructuous and may be disposed of accordingly. In view of statement made by the counsel for the private respondents, the instant Civil Revision Application stands dismissed being infructuous alongwith listed application. JUDGE *Faisal*
